header: Everything you need to ship pages faster
subheadline: A complete content toolkit for product and marketing teams, built on accessible, on-brand components.

feature_items.title: Reusable content blocks
feature_items.description: Assemble pages from pre-approved sections so every layout stays consistent and on-brand.

feature_items.title: Brand tokens built in
feature_items.description: Set colours, fonts, and spacing once. Every block updates automatically across the whole site.

feature_items.title: Fast by default
feature_items.description: Optimised markup and lazy-loaded media keep Core Web Vitals green without manual tuning.

feature_items.title: Accessible out of the box
feature_items.description: Semantic landmarks, keyboard support, and visible focus ship with every component you place.

feature_items.title: Built for teams
feature_items.description: Draft, review, and publish with roles and permissions that keep edits safe and traceable.

feature_items.title: Insight on every page
feature_items.description: See traffic and conversions per section so you can double down on what actually performs.
